description: Summarize any mzML/mzXML/featureXML/consensusXML/idXML: spectrum counts by MS level, RT/m/z ranges, TIC, chromatograms, precursor info, and instrument metadata; optional per-spectrum CSV.
rules: read-only: never mutates the input file
writes a human-readable summary to inspect.txt under record_store
optional per-spectrum table to SPECTRA_CSV (default spectra.csv in record_store)
usage: Set INPUT (an MS file). Optional SPECTRA_CSV. Output: inspect.txt (+ spectra.csv for raw spectra).
limitation: Requires pyOpenMS 3.5.0 (Python 3.9+) to produce real content; if absent the porter still writes inspect.txt and records the reason.
